Formula: Total M0 Watchers / Total New Subscribers

Defintion: Percentage of watchers watching a particular content more than 60 seconds out of total watchers for that content
Variations (grouped by): Time period

Defintion:
Intentional Watcher: A user who watches at least 60 seconds of a piece of content
Hooked Watcher: A user who has watched at least 240 seconds of content, but this can be modified using the Hook Time Threshold filter.
Completion Rate: Count of Completers / Count of Started Watching. If completion threshold is 0.8 and a video is 10 mins long, you will be called a completer if you watch atleast 8 minutes of the content.
Watch Rate: Average actual watch time / Length of the video. So if average actual watched time is 6 min 30 sec and length of the video is 10 mins, watch rate will be 65%.
Variations (grouped by): content wise, all users, intentional users, hooked users
Formula: Count of Completers / Count of Started Watching.
Rreference:
For user journey : ANALYTICS_PROD.DBT_CORE.FCT_USER_CONTENT_WATCH_DAILY, 
for content reference : ANALYTICS_PROD.DBT_CORE.DIM_CONTENT

Percentage of users who have watched for at least 8 unique watch days in their first 30 days of paid subscription

Dormant Users are users in >=31 days of subcription and have not watched anything in last 28 days. 
These are divided in two categories- Never Watched and Previously Watched.
Dormant Never Watched Users are those users who have never watched anything.
Dormant Previously Watched Users are those users who have previously watched something.
Watch Conversion is the percentage of users who watched something under "Never Watched" category of dormancy.
Variations (grouped by): These can be filtered under Dialects (HR, RJ, BH), Geography (Core, Non Core) and Install Status (Installed, Uninstalled). These can also segregated under HVU, MVU and LVU (High, Mid and Low Value Users)
Abbreviation:
HVU- High Value Users
MVU- Mid Value Users
LVU- Low Value Users

Defintion: Percentage of users who watched something under "Previously Watched" category of dormancy.
Variations (grouped by): These can be filtered under Dialects (HR, RJ, BH), Geography (Core, Non Core) and Install Status (Installed, Uninstalled). These can also segregated under HVU, MVU and LVU (High, Mid and Low Value Users)

Defintion: Total advertising spend inclusive of 18% GST applied at ingestion.

Defintion: Cost per 1,000 impressions inclusive of GST.
Variations (grouped by): creative, adset/adgroup, campaign, placement, channel, platform, show/content

Defintion: Cost per click inclusive of GST.

Defintion: Percentage of impressions that resulted in clicks.

Defintion: Percentage of clicks that resulted in an install within 7 days.

Defintion: Cost incurred to acquire one install inclusive of GST.

Defintion: Ratio of conservatively modeled lifetime value to customer acquisition cost.

Variations (grouped by): creative, adset/adgroup, campaign, placement, channel, platform, show/content, date
Logic: Trial entitlement granted. Deduped per device per attribution cycle. Cohort anchor for retention and monetization.

Defintion: Number of unique users who completed their first successful subscription charge.
Variations (grouped by): creative, adset/adgroup, campaign, placement, channel, platform, show/content, date
Logic: First successful charge event. Deduped per device per attribution cycle. No refunds or chargebacks applied.

Defintion: Percentage of trial activations that were cancelled between Day 1 and Day 9 after trial activation.
Variations (grouped by): creative, adset/adgroup, campaign, placement, channel, platform, show/content, date
Logic: Cohort anchored on trial activation. Same-user trial cancellation occurring on calendar days 1 through 9 (inclusive) after trial activation.

Defintion: Percentage of installs that resulted in a successful account sign-up.
Variations (grouped by): creative, adset/adgroup, campaign, placement, channel, platform, show/content, date
Logic: Same-user sign-up successful occurring after install within attribution window.
